case_title: TUSHER, KURT F. vs. TRANS-AMERICAN STEAMSHIP AGENCY, A CALIFORNIA CORP

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRANS-AMERICAN STEAMSHIP AGENCY, A CALIFORNIA CORPDBA TRANS-AMERICAN STEAMSHIP AGENCY $8,114.82 PRINCIPAL, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,203.82

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUSHER, KURT F. AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS-AMERICAN STEAMSHIP AGENCY, A CALIFORNIA CORPDBA TRANS-AMERICAN STEAMSHIP AGENCY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUSHER, KURT F. AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS-AMERICAN STEAMSHIP AGENCY, A CALIFORNIA CORPDBA TRANS-AMERICAN STEAMSHIP AGENCY
REIMBURSMENT FILING FEES. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF TUSHER, KURT F.
